allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const s=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); console.log\('BASE check:', s.includes\(\\"BASE='/api'\\"\)\); console.log\('API_KEY removed:', !s.includes\('d7993ehr01qqpmhft4lgd'\)\); console.log\('toast fn:', s.includes\('function toast\('\)\); console.log\('watchlist fn:', s.includes\('function toggleWatchlist\('\)\); console.log\('lsGet fn:', s.includes\('function lsGet\('\)\); console.log\('recent fn:', s.includes\('function getRecents\('\)\); console.log\('watchlistPanel:', s.includes\('id=\\"watchlistPanel\\"'\)\);")
